summary: Script is well-structured with `set -euo pipefail`, proper error handling, and clear separation of concerns. Workflow uses pinned actions (v4) and appropriate permissions. CRITICAL ISSUES: (1) Workflow references undefined fixture directories (fixtures/junit-only, fixtures/json-only, fixtures/mixed) — no fixture setup or creation, so workflow fails at runtime; (2) Workflow doesn't capture output to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY as per script comment; (3) No error validation or output assertions. Minor: parse_json uses subshell pipe pattern (line ~73) which works but risks subtle issues; flaky-test awk (line ~142-150) is dense—needs explanatory comment. Incomplete—cannot run successfully with `act` without fixture files.
